name: scan_accessibility_compliance
description: WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit across all Heady public-facing sites

name: generate_impact_report
description: Generate quarterly social impact report: users served, tasks automated, time saved

name: audit_data_privacy
description: Verify GDPR/CCPA compliance: data retention, consent tracking, right-to-delete

name: check_open_source_contributions
description: Track and report Heady's open-source contributions and community engagement

name: monitor_carbon_footprint
description: Estimate compute carbon footprint from Cloud Run usage and suggest optimizations

name: validate_ethical_ai_guidelines
description: Verify all LLM prompts follow ethical AI guidelines: no bias, no harmful content

name: generate_transparency_report
description: Auto-generate AI transparency report: model usage, decision explanations, data sources

name: check_digital_equity
description: Verify low-bandwidth and offline-capable modes function correctly
